[28:14] And their drink offerings shall be half an hin of wine unto a bullock, and the third part of an hin unto a ram, and a fourth part of an hin unto a lamb: this is the burnt offering of every month throughout the months of the year. [28:15] And one kid of the goats for a sin offering unto the LORD shall be offered, beside the continual burnt offering, and his drink offering. [28:16] And in the fourteenth day of the first month is the passover of the LORD.
ed: A certain number or amount; a small number.
ex: 「several」指一定的數量或程度，通常表示一個小數目或幾種情況。在本句中，它指的是用於一隻羊的十分之一麥面作為祭物。
